TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: O 'afar hananay i, ira ko kakaya'ay a tiyad. O sasera no tiyad no mira i, ira ko sapidangoy a oo'. Manga'ay a malakakaenen ko 'afar i cowacowa a finacadan. Manga'ay a malosapacedam ko 'afar, manga'ay ho a malosinafel cecay. Manga'ay a pakaenen i karase ko 'afar a malotanengnengan. Caay ka edeng o tanengnengan ko 'afar, manga'ay ho cangra a milowan to damay ato misolac to kadit no karase.
S.PHON: o~u °afar ńßananaj i, ira ko~u kakaja °aj a tija…¨~…ģ. o~u sas…ôra no~u tija…¨~…ģ no~u mira i, ira ko~u sapi…¨~…ģaŇčo~uj a o~uo~u °. maŇča °aj a ma…ĺakaka…ôn…ôn ko~u °afar i ¶o~uwa ¶o~uwa a fina ¶a…¨~…ģan. maŇča °aj a ma…ĺo~usapa ¶…ô…¨~…ģam ko~u °afar, maŇča °aj ńßo~u a ma…ĺo~usinaf…ô…ĺ ¶…ô ¶aj. maŇča °aj a paka…ôn…ôn i karas…ô ko~u °afar a ma…ĺo~utan…ôŇčn…ôŇčan. ¶aaj ka …ô…¨~…ģ…ôŇč o~u tan…ôŇčn…ôŇčan ko~u °afar, maŇča °aj ńßo~u ¶aŇčra a mi…ĺo~uwan to~u …¨~…ģamaj ato~u miso~u…ĺa ¶ to~u ka…¨~…ģit no~u karas…ô.
S.FORM: O 'afar hananay i, ira ko kakaya'ay a tiyad. O sasera no tiyad no mira i, ira ko sapidangoy a oo'. Manga'ay a malakakaenen ko 'afar i cowacowa a finacadan. Manga'ay a malosapacedam ko 'afar, manga'ay ho a malosinafel cecay. Manga'ay a pakaenen i karase ko 'afar a malotanengnengan. Caay ka edeng o tanengnengan ko 'afar, manga'ay ho cangra a milowan to damay ato misolac to kadit no karase.
S.PHON: o~u °afar ńßananaj i, ira ko~u kakaja °aj a tija…¨~…ģ. o~u sas…ôra no~u tija…¨~…ģ no~u mira i, ira ko~u sapi…¨~…ģaŇčo~uj a o~uo~u °. maŇča °aj a ma…ĺakaka…ôn…ôn ko~u °afar i ¶o~uwa ¶o~uwa a fina ¶a…¨~…ģan. maŇča °aj a ma…ĺo~usapa ¶…ô…¨~…ģam ko~u °afar, maŇča °aj ńßo~u a ma…ĺo~usinaf…ô…ĺ ¶…ô ¶aj. maŇča °aj a paka…ôn…ôn i karas…ô ko~u °afar a ma…ĺo~utan…ôŇčn…ôŇčan. ¶aaj ka …ô…¨~…ģ…ôŇč o~u tan…ôŇčn…ôŇčan ko~u °afar, maŇča °aj ńßo~u ¶aŇčra a mi…ĺo~uwan to~u …¨~…ģamaj ato~u miso~u…ĺa ¶ to~u ka…¨~…ģit no~u karas…ô.
